description:
Recto: Official-looking Arabic letter, with an ʿalāma at upper left. Dating: probably early Ottoman-period. From "the poor slave" to "al-Shaykh al-Imām al-ʿĀlim al-ʿAllāma Badr al-Dīn Sharīf [...]."

Verso: Looks like the beginning of a legal document mentioning a Jewish man. There is also a seal imprint at upper right.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
